x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Integration Hub is the execution layer for AI Agent actions that interact with external systems. Without active Integration Hub spokes, AI Agents cannot perform real-world automation beyond the ServiceNow platform.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Integration Hub via sys_plugins_list.do (search: Integration Hub). Ensure the IntegrationHub Runtime and relevant spokes are active. AI Agents rely on spokes for external system actions.
